docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ENDSLEY-FENN, HEIDI J. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCAFFREY, MARK KIM, LEON: AGENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENDSLEY-FENN, HEIDI J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCAFFREY, MARK $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENDSLEY-FENN, HEIDI J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, LEON: AGENT $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00, TRIAL HEARD 7/9/93, JUDGMENT INADVERTENTLY ENTERED AGAINST MARK MCCAFFREY, THEREFORE, IT IS HEREBY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE JUDGMENT OF JULY 9, 1993 IS AMENDED NUNC PRO TUNC ON 7/9/93 AS PER ABOVE AND CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCAFFREY WITH PREJUDICE.
